case_title: PAN, ZHONG NING vs. MURPHY, MORRIS MACK et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAN, ZHONG NING AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, MORRIS MACK DOES 1-30 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-12-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-07-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-25-1999
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAN, ZHONG NING SERVED JUL-22-1999, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, MORRIS MACK

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-12-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY FILIPPELLI JOSEPH. HEARING SET FOR DEC-22-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-22-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY FILIPPELLI JOSEPH, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILES STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. HEARING SET FOR FEB-23-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT OR UNINSURED MOTORIST DESIGNATION. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY FILIPPELLI JOSEPH. HEARING SET FOR MAR-29-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER OF EXEMPTION FROM TRIAL DELY CASE MANAGEMENT RULES - GRANTED - COMMISSIONER ARLENE BORICK. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAN, ZHONG NING

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THIS UNINSURED MOTORIST ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY FILIPPELLI JOSEPH. HEARING SET FOR SEP-05-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
